nasb.text: There is gold, and an abundance of jewels; But the lips of knowledge are a more precious thing.

esv.text: There is gold and abundance of costly stones, but the lips of knowledge are a precious jewel.

cnv.text: 雖有金子、許多紅寶石和寶器， 但充滿知識的嘴唇比這一切更寶貴。

ccb.text: 智慧之言胜过黄金和许多珠宝。

csbs.text: 世上有金子和许多红宝石， 但充满知识的嘴唇才是贵重的宝物。
